notes: Removed developer-facing desktop-comparison text from the Pathmark Online user interface.
Added a stepped Pathmark Online guide that walks users through Areas, routines, goals, actions, and exports.
Improved the printable PDF tasklist with real checkbox symbols and removed the plain text tasklist download from the normal interface.
Reduced alarming code-style output in the user interface by replacing diagnostic code blocks and raw sheet IDs with user-friendly summaries.
Softened low-level API error messages shown during save/update actions.
